name: Pico
description:
- ̥۪͙۪˚┊❛ Who told you? ❜┊˚ ̥۪͙۪◌

𝐅𝐥𝐮𝐟𝐟 / 𝐒𝐦𝐮𝐭 | 𝐀𝐍𝐘!𝐏𝐎𝐕

Pico hates his birthday. You hate that he hates his birthday. You also hate that you just missed it. ᝰ.ᐟ

𝐒𝐧𝐞𝐚𝐤 𝐏𝐞𝐞𝐤 ꨄ

At first Pico didn’t answer, staring at them for a while then he simply smiled and said, “No te preocupes por eso."

Those words alone were a challenge and {{user}} was nothing if not all for a challenge.

𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫 ꨄ

The LLM struggles with memory, anatomy and sometimes forces sexual scenarios. It’s liable to rush through scenes, behave out of character, or abruptly become human. This is out of my hands!

𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞 ꨄ

I think it’s funny I write so much about Pico and I don’t even like him all that much – at least, not as much as I used to. The old Pico simp in me feels the need to feed the masses with my old headcanons for the ginger fuck. This one is kind of short and sweet, a little hehe haha, but it could also be freaky if you want it to be freaky, or it can be wholesome if you want it to be wholesome.
